connection_id.description: If provided, this will allow editing of the provided connection during the Self-Service Enterprise Configuration flow

enabled_clients.description: List of client_ids that the connection will be enabled for.

enabled_organizations.description: List of organizations that the connection will be enabled for.

ttl_sec.description: Number of seconds for which the ticket is valid before expiration. If unspecified or set to 0, this value defaults to 432000 seconds (5 days).

use_for_organization_discovery.description: Indicates whether a verified domain should be used for organization discovery during authentication.
